title: October 18
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}
'''October 18''' is the 291st day of the year (292nd in leap years). There are 74 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1930|1930]] – [[David Tomblin]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Gerald Home]] is born.
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Jeff Moon]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[John Schwartzman]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Shawna Trpcic]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 37|''Star Wars Weekly'' 37]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 79|''Star Wars'' 79]] published.
*[[1986]] – "[[Gone With the Mimphs]]" and "[[The First Apprentice]]" air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Insider 63|''Star Wars Insider'' 63]] released for subscribers.
*[[2005]] – [[John Hollis]] dies.
*[[2011]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars The Complete Season Three|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': The Complete Season Three]] released.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.39]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – ''[[The Best of Star Wars Insider Volume 3]]'' released.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 3|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 3]] published.
*2017 – [[Poe Dameron 20|''Poe Dameron'' 20]] published.
*2017 – [[Captain Phasma 4|''Captain Phasma'' 4]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Annual 2019]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Vol. 4 — Crimson Reign]]'' published.
*2022 – "[[Tauntaun (Galactic Pals)|Tauntaun]]" and "[[Rancor (Galactic Pals)|Rancor]]" premiere on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids]] YouTube channel.
*[[2023]] – [[Obi-Wan Kenobi 2|''Obi-Wan Kenobi'' 2]] published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars (2020) 39|''Star Wars'' (2020) 39]] published.
<noinclude>
